name: evomtrs-site
description: EVOMTRS static marketing site build scripts

scripts.build:example: env -i PATH="$PATH" python3 scripts/render_site.py public dist --env-file .env.example
scripts.verify: npm run build:example && npm run verify:static
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 8080
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
